# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-05-03)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Physiotherapy with integrated virtual reality for patients with severe chronic low back pain: cluster-randomized controlled trial (VARIETY).
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik fizyoterapi with integrated sanal gerçeklik for patients with severe chronic bel ağrısı: cluster-randomize controlled klinik çalışma (variety). konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc musculoskeletal disorders. 2026 may 1. Anahtar kavramlar: fizyoterapi, integrated, virtual, reality, patients, severe.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42067884/

### Individual and combined associations of modifiable metabolic health and lifestyle with low back pain, neck pain, and functional limitation: evidence from a nationally cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik individual and combined associations of modifiable metabolic health and lifestyle with bel ağrısı, neck ağrı, and fonksiyonal limitation: evidence from a nationally cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc public health. 2026 may 1. Anahtar kavramlar: health, ağrı, individual, combined, associations, modifiable.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42067820/

### TDP43 cytoplasmic mislocalization initiates mitochondrial dysfunction and intercellular senescence propagation in intervertebral disc degeneration.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik tdp43 cytoplasmic mislocalization initiates mitochondrial dysfonksiyon and intercellular senescence propagation in intervertebral disc degeneration. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: experimental & molecular medicine. 2026 may 1. Anahtar kavramlar: tdp, cytoplasmic, mislocalization, initiates, mitochondrial, dysfonksiyon.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42067620/

### Multicenter evaluation of three-shot SAM2 segmentation for group-level quantification of lumbar paraspinal muscles at the L4/L5 level on multi-sequence MRI.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik multicenter evaluation of three-shot sam2 segmentation for group-level quantification of lomber (bel bölgesi) paraspinal muscles at the l4/l5 level on multi-sequence mri. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european journal of radiology. 2026 apr 27. Anahtar kavramlar: level, multicenter, evaluation, three, shot, sam.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42066627/

### What are the predictors of nonroutine discharge after surgery for grade 2 lumbar spondylolisthesis? A Spine CORe™ analysis of QOD data.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik what are the predictors of nonroutine discharge after surgery for grade 2 lomber (bel bölgesi) spondylolisthesis? a spine core™ analysis of qod data. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: neurosurgical focus. 2026 may 1. Anahtar kavramlar: what, predictors, nonroutine, discharge, after, surgery.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42066364/

### Fat infiltration is moderately associated with disease activity in ankylosing spondylitis: a cross-sectional study: Lumbar paraspinal muscles in ankylosing spondylitis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik fat infiltration is moderately associated with disease activity in ankylosing spondylitis: a cross-sectional study: lomber (bel bölgesi) paraspinal muscles in ankylosing spondylitis. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medicine. 2026 may 1. Anahtar kavramlar: ankylosing, spondylitis, fat, infiltration, moderately, associated.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42065197/

### Upright supine imaging can detect clinically relevant occult instability in degenerative lumbar spondylolisthesis - A two-year PROM based comparison with flexion extension radiographs.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik upright supine imaging can detect clinically relevant occult instability in degenerative lomber (bel bölgesi) spondylolisthesis - a two-year prom based comparison with flexion extension radiographs. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: brain & spine. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: upright, supine, imaging, can, detect, clinically.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42064349/
